title: schnella poiteauana
intro: Schnella poiteauana, also known as the "Bastard Cedar" or "Scheelea poiteauana", is a species of flowering plant in the family Arecaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Schnella poiteauana are derived from its bark, leaves, and roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Schnella poiteauana include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and swelling, and prevent the growth of bacteria and other microorganisms. Schnella poiteauana is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
